description: Optimized for LOW FALSE NEGATIVES. Qualify aggressively - better to include than miss.

categories.name: HIGH_CONFIDENCE
categories.description: Clear evidence of imports AND international shipping.

categories.name: MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE
categories.description: Likely qualifies via industry inference. USE THIS LIBERALLY - when in doubt, qualify.

categories.name: DISQUALIFIED
categories.description: ONLY use when: (1) no physical products, (2) explicitly US-made with proof, OR (3) explicitly US-only shipping stated.

questions.question: Does this company sell physical products?
questions.guidance: YES: any tangible products. NO: only software/consulting/digital.

questions.question: Does this company likely import goods into the US?
questions.guidance: DEFAULT TO YES for: apparel, fashion, footwear, electronics, tools, beauty, furniture, toys. Only answer NO if: explicitly 'Made in USA' with factory proof, OR print-on-demand/screen printing.

questions.question: Does this company ship internationally (beyond Canada/Mexico)?
questions.guidance: LEAN YES if: e-commerce site with Shopify/standard platform, fashion/apparel brand, any mention of international/worldwide/global. Only answer NO if: explicitly states 'US only' or 'domestic shipping only'.

questions.question: Is this company a brand owner or importer?
questions.guidance: YES: has own brand, imports directly, specialty/niche products. NO only if: purely resells mainstream US brands.

classification_logic.description: MINIMIZE FALSE NEGATIVES. When uncertain, QUALIFY.
simple_rules: Rule 2: Explicit 'Made in USA' with factory proof → DISQUALIFIED
Rule 4: Everything else with physical products → MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE minimum
Rule 5: Strong import + export signals → HIGH_CONFIDENCE
classification_logic.critical_constraint: When in doubt, QUALIFY as MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE. False negatives are worse than false positives.

sufficiency_check.prompt_addition: CRITICAL: Minimize false negatives. If company sells physical products and is NOT explicitly US-made/US-only, qualify as MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE.
